a11y_notes: Label each bar with value via label prop; use pattern fills for colorblind users; keyboard navigation via tabIndex
use_case: Compare values across discrete categories up to 12; e.g. sales per quarter by region

a11y_notes: Add aria-label to ResponsiveContainer; use title+desc inside SVG; provide data table alternative
use_case: Show continuous trends over time on ordered data; e.g. active-user growth over 12 months

a11y_notes: Never use pie for >6 segments; always show legend with values; add aria-label per slice
use_case: Show proportions of a whole with max 5-6 clear segments; e.g. revenue split across 3 product lines

a11y_notes: Same as pie; center label must pass 4.5:1 contrast; avoid thin slices <5%
use_case: Same as pie when highlighting a central KPI; e.g. market share of 4 competitors with total % in center

a11y_notes: Provide tooltip with both axis values; use shape+color encoding; include regression line description
use_case: Show correlation between two continuous variables and spot outliers; e.g. marketing budget vs conversions

a11y_notes: Distinguish fills with pattern not just color; provide CSV export; ensure 3:1 contrast for stroke
use_case: Emphasize cumulative volume over time; stacked for composition; e.g. web traffic stacked by acquisition channel

a11y_notes: Use sequential accessible palette (ColorBrewer); provide value on focus; include legend scale
use_case: Reveal patterns in 2D matrices by intensity; e.g. user activity by hour of day and day of week

a11y_notes: Minimum cell area 40x40px; on-focus tooltip; provide list view toggle
use_case: Show hierarchy and proportions of a whole with many categories; e.g. spend by department and sub-category

a11y_notes: Label each stage with value and %; announce conversion rates; RTL support
use_case: Show step-by-step conversion in a sequential process; e.g. sales pipeline lead to demo to proposal to close

a11y_notes: Announce current value and thresholds verbally; use color + position encoding; avoid relying on color alone
use_case: Show a single KPI against a target or 0-100% range; e.g. real-time system uptime percentage

a11y_notes: Add axis labels with sufficient contrast; provide numeric table fallback; limit to 6-8 axes
use_case: Compare multiple qualitative attributes across 2-4 entities; e.g. skills of candidate A vs B over 6 dimensions

a11y_notes: Encode size in aria-label (not just visually); min bubble size 8px for touch; legend required
use_case: Scatter plot with a third dimension encoded in point size; e.g. countries by GDP, life expectancy and population

a11y_notes: Annotate each step with signed value and running total; provide ordered data table alternative; encode positive/negative with shape+label not color alone; ensure focus order follows sequence
use_case: Show how positive and negative components build to a total; e.g. EBITDA variation from Q1 adding and subtracting factors

a11y_notes: Group tasks beyond 50 rows; provide tabular schedule alternative with start, end and dependencies; keyboard focus per bar; encode dependencies with labels not color alone
use_case: Show tasks over time with duration and dependencies in projects; e.g. product launch timeline with milestones

a11y_notes: Annotate flow values; provide link list as alternative; high contrast node borders
use_case: Show flows and proportions between states or categories; e.g. web traffic from source to landing page to conversion

a11y_notes: Use color + pattern; label every bin; screen reader description of distribution shape
use_case: Show frequency distribution of a continuous variable; e.g. API response-time distribution in milliseconds

a11y_notes: Provide a statistics table alternative with median, quartiles and outliers; on-focus readout per group; encode groups with shape+label not color alone; add plain-language summary for non-technical readers
use_case: Compare statistical distributions (median, quartiles, outliers) across groups; e.g. salaries by department and seniority

a11y_notes: Pair with a numeric density/quartile table alternative; on-focus value readout; encode groups with pattern+label not color alone; require 30+ points per group and note it for non-technical audiences
use_case: Show full density distribution, more expressive than box plot; e.g. ticket-resolution times by incident type

a11y_notes: Use sequential accessible palette (ColorBrewer); provide a ranked region-value table alternative; on-focus value readout; normalize by area to avoid size distortion; never rely on color alone
use_case: Show variation of a metric by geographic region; e.g. e-commerce conversion rate by province or state

a11y_notes: Cluster beyond 100 nodes; provide an adjacency or edge-list table alternative; keyboard focus traversal between nodes; label relationships not color alone; high contrast node borders
use_case: Show relationships between nodes in a graph (social, dependencies, flows); e.g. dependency graph between platform microservices

a11y_notes: Provide a chronological event list alternative; on-focus event readout; avoid overlapping simultaneous events; encode categories with icon+label not color alone
use_case: Show discrete events over time with narrative context; e.g. product milestone history of launches and key events

a11y_notes: Use sequential accessible palette (ColorBrewer); provide value on focus per day; include legend scale; never rely on color alone for intensity
use_case: Show daily activity across a full year (GitHub-style pattern); e.g. a developer's daily commits over the last year

a11y_notes: Minimum height 32px; always pair with numeric value; tooltip on hover/focus
use_case: Show a compact trend inside a table cell or KPI card; e.g. mini weekly-sales trend within a product table

a11y_notes: Expose the value and its context (delta, target, period) as text; announce trend direction verbally; encode variation with arrow+label not color alone; ensure 4.5:1 contrast on value
use_case: Show a single key number with context (variation, target, period); e.g. current-month revenue vs previous month and target
